contract.cost_status: no charges, slippage, or SPAN margin applied
contract.crossings: first crossing per trade_date, threshold, and direction
contract.execution: signal at t; frictionless structure path entered at exact t+1
contract.expiry_status: nearest-listed-expiry research proxy, not proven contract identity
contract.independence_warning: threshold cells overlap across dates and thresholds; do not sum them as independent trades
contract.vrp_curve: causal same-minute-of-day percentile of ATM_IV^2 minus trailing 60-minute ACT/365 RV^2
